visualNotes: 두껍고 둥근 초콜릿 쿠키 또는 반달형 쿠키 쉘 실루엣
반으로 갈랐을 때 피스타치오 크림, 바삭한 카다이프, 쫀득한 마시멜로 층이 단면에 또렷하게 보임
겉은 초콜릿 코팅 또는 코코아 톤, 속은 피스타치오 그린과 황금빛 카다이프가 대비되는 구조
살짝 장난기 있는 눈매와 자신감 있는 포즈
고급 디저트 숍 느낌의 정갈한 드리즐과 절제된 스파크 포인트
promptBase: Premium bakery mascot character made from a real Dubai-style chewy cookie dessert, elegant and cute, luxury Korean bakery branding, warm ivory, pistachio, caramel, and chocolate palette, soft studio lighting, refined packaging mood, clean silhouette, mobile-friendly, not childish, no text, transparent background.

rarityPrompts.common: Keep the character clean, witty, and highly readable. Make it unmistakably a Dubai chewy cookie with visible pistachio cream filling, kataifi texture, and glossy chocolate accents. Focus on premium dessert identity first, mascot second.
rarityPrompts.rare: Add exactly one or two elegant premium adornments that match an ENTP Dubai chewy cookie character: for example refined pistachio cream piping, boutique chocolate drizzle, or a clever signature garnish. Keep it fashionable, premium, and realistic. Do not add aura, glow, sparkle, magical effects, or more than two adornments.
rarityPrompts.superRare: Make it unmistakably super rare and luxurious. Add exactly two or three couture adornments, such as jewel-like pistachio garnish, premium ribbon or collector tag detail, and ornate chocolate decoration. The character must also have a more luxurious expression or confident high-end pose. Visible rarity effects are required: soft glow, elegant sparkle, luminous highlight, or collector-grade luxury lighting. This version must look clearly more extravagant and rarer than the rare version.

visualNotes: 작고 도톰한 마들렌 또는 미니 파운드케이크처럼 봉긋한 타원형 실루엣
윗면은 버터에 구워진 진한 황금빛과 갈색 크러스트, 아래쪽은 매끈하고 촉촉한 결
겉은 바삭하지만 속은 찹쌀 반죽처럼 밀도 높고 쫀득한 내부 구조
버터 향이 강한 구움과자 무드, 마들렌과 떡 사이의 하이브리드 디저트 인상
promptBase: Premium bakery mascot character made from a real butter rice cake pastry, elegant and cute, luxury Korean bakery branding, warm ivory and butter cream palette, soft studio lighting, refined packaging mood, clean silhouette, mobile-friendly, not childish, no text, transparent background.

rarityPrompts.common: Keep the character soft, comforting, and neatly finished. Focus on the buttery surface, chewy rice cake body, and a calm, dependable expression.
rarityPrompts.rare: Add exactly one or two elegant premium adornments that match an ISFJ Shanghai buttertteok character: for example refined bakery wrapping, a delicate butter flower garnish, or a gentle boutique ribbon detail. Keep it warm, premium, and realistic. Do not add aura, glow, sparkle, magical effects, or more than two adornments.
rarityPrompts.superRare: Make it unmistakably super rare and luxurious. Add exactly two or three couture adornments, such as premium wrapping detail, collector-grade butter garnish, pearl-like sugar decoration, or boutique label ornament. The character must also have a more luxurious expression or graceful high-end pose. Visible rarity effects are required: soft glow, elegant sparkle, luminous highlight, or flagship boutique lighting. visualNotes: 긴 타원형 바타르 또는 둥근 불 형태의 묵직한 수제빵 실루엣
윗면에 깊고 길게 열린 칼집과 발효로 벌어진 귀 모양의 크러스트
짙은 갈색부터 황금빛까지 이어지는 두꺼운 크러스트와 얇은 밀가루 더스팅
속은 기공이 살아 있는 오픈 크럼을 암시하되, 과한 표정보다 절제된 장인 분위기
